Barilla Bolognese Sauce is a rich pasta sauce made with natural ingredients and a sweet and mild balance of 100% Italian field-grown tomatoes, onion, garlic and herbs – perfect as a base for ragu. Paired well with both sophisticated and simple pasta cuts, try this fragrant, everyday Italian pasta sauce with any cut of your choice, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli.
A perfect everyday Mediterranean sauce, it's great for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love.
